subcodes.first_line: O servant of Truth! Thy letter was received and perused. Praise be to God, thou art occupied with the remembrance of God and desirest the exaltation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق نامه شما رسید و ملاحظه گردید الحمد لله در فکر ذکر حقید و آرزوی اعلای
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @words vs deeds, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @love as fire
